title: 2023 FOMC Press Releases

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This page is an index listing all Federal Reserve FOMC press releases from 2023, including statements from eight FOMC meetings and four economic projection releases. It does not contain the substantive content of any individual FOMC statement—it is a navigation page that links to separate documents.
key_points: This is a listing/index page containing links to 2023 FOMC statements dated 2/1, 3/22, 5/3, 6/14, 7/26, 9/20, and 12/13.
The page also indexes four economic projection releases from March, June, September, and December 2023.
One additional link references the Committee's reaffirmation of its Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy dated 2/1/2023.
No substantive FOMC statement text, rate decisions, or policy language is present on this page.
why_it_matters: This page serves as a directory to 2023 FOMC decisions but does not itself constitute an archiveable policy document. Researchers must navigate to individual FOMC statements for actual policy content. Per CORE RULE 5, listing pages should be rejected in favor of sourceable individual statements.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type classification - violates CORE RULE 5
No substantive policy content present - only links to individual FOMC statements
event_type is 'unknown' but cannot be meaningfully assigned to a navigation/listing page

Record has no archival value as it does not contain actual FOMC statement text, rate decisions, or policy language

notes: PAGE_TYPE classified as listing_page per CORE RULE 6—non-archiveable. Source is a navigational index with no substantive policy content. The actual FOMC statements from 2023 (when the Fed held rates steady at 5.25-5.50% after July 2023) should be sourced from individual statement URLs. Historical record: all 2023 FOMC meetings are over 2 years old relative to TODAY (2026-03-31).
